nodes.name: Täglich 8:15 Uhr
nodes.notes: Läuft 15 Minuten nach Workflow #221, damit Untis-Daten bereits im Snapshot sind.

parameters.query:
-- ========================================================================
-- DEPUTATSDATEN AUS UNTIS FÜR STELLENISTBERECHNUNG
-- ========================================================================
-- Workflow: #222 Stellenist-Sync
-- Datum: 12.03.2026
-- Liest aktuelle Periode: Teacher + Terms, berechnet Deputats-Aufteilung
-- ========================================================================

WITH AktuellesPeriode AS (
    SELECT 
        SCHOOLYEAR_ID,
        TERM_ID,
        DateFrom,
        DateTo,
        Name AS Term_Name
    FROM Terms
    WHERE 
        Deleted = 0
        AND SCHOOLYEAR_ID = (SELECT MAX(SCHOOLYEAR_ID) FROM Teacher WHERE Deleted = 0)
        AND TERM_ID = (SELECT MAX(TERM_ID) FROM Teacher WHERE Deleted = 0 AND SCHOOLYEAR_ID = (
            SELECT MAX(SCHOOLYEAR_ID) FROM Teacher WHERE Deleted = 0
        ))
),
NaechstePeriode AS (
    SELECT 
        ap.SCHOOLYEAR_ID,
        ap.TERM_ID,
        MIN(t2.DateFrom) AS NextDateFrom
    FROM AktuellesPeriode ap
    LEFT JOIN Terms t2 ON t2.SCHOOLYEAR_ID = ap.SCHOOLYEAR_ID 
        AND t2.DateFrom > ap.DateFrom
        AND t2.Deleted = 0
    GROUP BY ap.SCHOOLYEAR_ID, ap.TERM_ID
)
SELECT 
    t.TEACHER_ID,
    t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID,
    t.TERM_ID,
    t.Name,
    t.PNumber AS Personalnummer,
    t.OwnSchool AS Stammschule,
    CONCAT(t.Longname, ' ', t.FirstName) AS Vollname,
    ISNULL(TRY_CAST(t.PlannedWeek AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0) / 1000.0 AS Deputat,
    CONCAT(
        RIGHT('0000' + CAST(t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID / 10000 AS VARCHAR), 4), 
        '/', 
        RIGHT('0000' + CAST(t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID % 10000 AS VARCHAR), 4)
    ) AS Schuljahr_Text,
    ap.Term_Name,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEFROMPARTS(
        ap.DateFrom / 10000, 
        (ap.DateFrom / 100) % 100, 
        ap.DateFrom % 100
    ), 104) AS DateFrom_Formatted,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -1, 
        CASE 
            WHEN np.NextDateFrom IS NOT NULL THEN 
                DATEFROMPARTS(np.NextDateFrom / 10000, (np.NextDateFrom / 100) % 100, np.NextDateFrom % 100)
            ELSE 
                DATEFROMPARTS(ap.DateTo / 10000, (ap.DateTo / 100) % 100, ap.DateTo % 100)
        END
    ), 104) AS DateTo_Formatted,
    -- Deputats-Aufteilung nach Schulform (PATINDEX-Fix 27.02.2026)
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) > 0 THEN
            ISNULL(TRY_CAST(LEFT(
                SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20),
                CASE 
                    WHEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) > 0 
                    THEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) - 1
                    ELSE LEN(SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('1~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20))
                END
            ) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0) / 1000.0
        ELSE 0
    END AS Deputat_GES,
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) > 0 THEN
            ISNULL(TRY_CAST(LEFT(
                SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20),
                CASE 
                    WHEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) > 0 
                    THEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) - 1
                    ELSE LEN(SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('2~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20))
                END
            ) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0) / 1000.0
        ELSE 0
    END AS Deputat_GYM,
    CASE 
        WHEN CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) > 0 THEN
            ISNULL(TRY_CAST(LEFT(
                SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20),
                CASE 
                    WHEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) > 0 
                    THEN PATINDEX('%[^0-9]%', SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20)) - 1
                    ELSE LEN(SUBSTRING(t.PlannedPerDept, CHARINDEX('3~', t.PlannedPerDept) + 2, 20))
                END
            ) AS DECIMAL(10,2)), 0) / 1000.0
        ELSE 0
    END AS Deputat_BK
FROM Teacher t
CROSS JOIN AktuellesPeriode ap
LEFT JOIN NaechstePeriode np ON ap.SCHOOLYEAR_ID = np.SCHOOLYEAR_ID AND ap.TERM_ID = np.TERM_ID
WHERE 
    t.Deleted = 0 
    AND t.Longname IS NOT NULL 
    AND t.Longname != ''
    AND t.SCHOOLYEAR_ID = ap.SCHOOLYEAR_ID
    AND t.TERM_ID = ap.TERM_ID
ORDER BY 
    t.Longname, t.FirstName;

nodes.name: Sync-Payload erstellen
nodes.notes: Wandelt Untis-Rohdaten in API-Payload für /api/deputate/sync um

nodes.name: Daten vorhanden?
nodes.notes: Überspringt HTTP-Request wenn keine Lehrer aus Untis kamen

nodes.name: An Stellenist-App senden
nodes.notes: POST /api/deputate/sync — sendet alle Lehrerdaten an die Webanwendung

nodes.name: Sync erfolgreich?
nodes.notes: Prüft ob die API mit success: true geantwortet hat

nodes.name: Fehler protokollieren
nodes.notes: Loggt Fehler und gibt Hinweise zur Problemlösung
